command: set -a; [ -f src/backend/.env ] && . src/backend/.env; set +a; : "${REDIS_HOST:?REDIS_HOST missing}"; : "${REDIS_PORT:=6379}"; : "${REDIS_USERNAME:=default}"; : "${REDIS_PASSWORD:?REDIS_PASSWORD missing}"; exec uvx --from redis-mcp-server@latest redis-mcp-server --url "redis://${REDIS_USERNAME}:${REDIS_PASSWORD}@${REDIS_HOST}:${REDIS_PORT}/0"
